posts.name: Frank Murray III
posts.cooked:
Some of you joined the Kutch Zoom event last Friday, we had 30 people on. We themed it Kutch, and had Jamie Kutch be our guest. My impression of that event is that people enjoyed it, they asked good questions and we got to share around a theme.

Is there interest to do one themed for Rivers-Marie? I have asked them if they want to join, but I have not heard back. In lieu of waiting, I figured I’d ask all of you about interest and we can elect to move forward even if the winery doesn’t join.

Post here if you are interested. In deference to our East Coast friends, we could do 5PM PT / 8PM ET. Would like to do next week, day TBD.

I can ask Frenchie if he will let us use the WB Zoom line to do it.

TO BE PART OF THE EVENT, PLEASE READ THE FOLLOWING. THANK YOU.

Date/Time: Tuesday, April 7th @ 5PM PT / 8PM ET

Theme: Open any bottle of Rivers-Marie you want to enjoy

How To Connect: To avoid bad things being posted during the event, we are NOT sharing the link here. So, to get the Zoom link to connect to the event, simply send a private message to Frank Murray III. I will then send you the link in a private reply. We know this creates an extra step but we want to protect the event. Once you receive the link, please do NOT forward it.

Attendance is expected to be large for this event and we will work to accommodate everyone but we encourage you to join on time or early.

We’ll be muting everyone’s audio so we can eliminate background noise. You’ll also be optioned to turn on your camera if you like…we want to connect and have some fun and fellowship with Thomas, Will and the RM fans so video is encouraged.

Finally, if you want to post your RM wine now, please do. It will be cool to see what everyone is bringing to the event.

Talk to you all Tuesday.
